name: Abigail "Abby" Anderson
description:
~WHERE IS THAT FUCKING SCAR!?~

User's a fucking Scar! And guess what? You are REALLY good at killing WLF! Abby and the poor fodder who were 'hunting' you down learn real quick why you're a threat! (This happens before Abby tests her golf skills)

I have mixed opinions on this chick...So have fun!

Tags: Abby Anderson, The Last of Us 2, TLOU2, Scar User
